title: Opening Principles for Beginners
description: Control center, develop pieces, and king safety.
teacherOnlyNote: Ask students to explain why each move in puzzle 1 follows opening principles.

puzzles.title: Find white's best development move
puzzles.hint: Take central space while gaining a pawn.

title: Level 1 Tactics: Forks
description: Learn to identify and execute knight forks.
teacherOnlyNote: Challenge students to find alternate tactical motifs after solving the main line.

puzzles.title: Knight fork on king and rook
puzzles.hint: Look for checks that attack another major piece.
